name: pets-extension
description: Chrome extension for contextual web pets

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/content/main.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=build/content/content-script.js --target=es2020 && esbuild src/ui/main.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=build/ui/popup.js --target=es2020 && esbuild src/background/service-worker.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=build/background/service-worker.js --target=es2020 && cp src/ui/popup.html build/ui/popup.html && cp src/ui/popup.css build/ui/popup.css && cp manifest.json build/manifest.json && cp -r assets build/
scripts.minify: terser build/content/content-script.js -o build/content/content-script.js -m -c drop_console=true && terser build/ui/popup.js -o build/ui/popup.js -m -c drop_console=true && terser build/background/service-worker.js -o build/background/service-worker.js -m -c drop_console=true
scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run minify && find build -name '*.map' -delete && echo '✓ Production build ready'
